---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new research objective, case study, or index algorithm
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

**Describe the proposed extension**
Is this feature associated with a specific Research Question (RQ) or new geographic case study? Describe the need clearly.

**Proposed Implementation**
Outline the changes:
- Ingestion adjustments (GEE/CDSE collections)
- Mathematical equations/band calculations (e.g. adding EVI, NBR)
- User interface requirements (map layers, dashboard charts)

**Ground Truth Sources**
What databases or reports will validate this new anomaly (e.g. World Bank, national mining registries, IMF)?
